reviews.comment:
Vamos muy seguido. Antes tenía una cafetería que cerró con la pandemia. Deberían abrirla nuevamente.

(Translated by Google)
We go there very often. They used to have a coffee shop that closed during the pandemic. They should reopen it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPNmFESmNnEAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar ..baños limpios. Inflas las ruedas de tu auto gratis. Y encontras accesorios para tu vehículo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place...clean restrooms. Free tire inflation. And you can find accessories for your vehicle.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPMFpmUnBnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cuando no queda más remedio hay que reaprovisionar combustible en el barrio, no es lo mejor, es más caro que en Caba pero siempre buena calidad y muy buen servicio de los playeros una gran pena que nunca más abrió el kiosco, comedero .

(Translated by Google)
When there's no other option, you have to refuel in the neighborhood; it's not the best, it's more expensive than in Caba, but the quality is always good and the service from the gas station attendants is very good. It's a great shame that the kiosk/restaurant never reopened.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPMGVYMUpnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención ,podés pagar con la aplicación y tenés descuento con qr.lo recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, you can pay with the app and get a discount with a QR code. I recommend it.

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicios YPF (ACA). La atención es regular. Tardan demasiado en atenderte. A veces es inexplicable porque no hay casi clientes y aún así, tardan. Regular.

(Translated by Google)
YPF (ACA) gas station. The service is mediocre. They take too long to serve you. Sometimes it's inexplicable because there are hardly any customers, and yet they still take so long. Average.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPb3ZtdGhnRRAB
